questions.question: ISO/IEC 27001 originated from which British standard?
questions.explanation: ISO/IEC 27001 evolved from the British Standard BS 7799.

questions.question: Which organization initially developed BS 7799?
questions.explanation: BSI created BS 7799 before it became an international standard.

questions.question: ISO/IEC 27001 is related to:
questions.explanation: The standard focuses on managing information security risks.

questions.question: When was ISO/IEC 27001 first published?
questions.explanation: ISO/IEC 27001 was first published in 2005.

questions.question: ISO/IEC 27001 is a standard for:
questions.explanation: It specifies requirements for an Information Security Management System.

questions.question: The purpose of ISO/IEC 27001 is to:
questions.explanation: The standard helps organizations manage information security.

questions.question: BS 7799 Part 2 became:
questions.explanation: BS 7799 Part 2 formed the basis of ISO/IEC 27001.

questions.question: Which revision of ISO/IEC 27001 introduced major updates to Annex A?
questions.explanation: The 2022 revision reorganized and updated Annex A controls.

questions.question: The 2013 version of ISO/IEC 27001 aligned with:
questions.explanation: This made integration with other ISO standards easier.

questions.question: Why was ISO/IEC 27001 developed?
options: To provide an international information security standard
questions.correct_answer: To provide an international information security standard
questions.explanation: Organizations needed a globally recognized framework.

questions.question: IEC in ISO/IEC stands for:
questions.explanation: IEC collaborates with ISO on international standards.

questions.question: The evolution of ISO/IEC 27001 reflects:
options: Changing security threats and business needs
questions.correct_answer: Changing security threats and business needs
questions.explanation: The standard evolves to remain relevant.

questions.question: ISO/IEC 27001 certification became popular because it:
questions.explanation: Certification shows a structured approach to security.

questions.question: The transition from BS 7799 to ISO/IEC 27001 provided:
questions.explanation: International standardization increased acceptance worldwide.

questions.question: The 2013 revision emphasized:
questions.explanation: Risk management became more prominent.

questions.question: The 2022 revision updated:
questions.explanation: Controls were consolidated and modernized.

questions.question: A major benefit of ISO/IEC 27001's evolution is:
questions.explanation: Updates address new technologies and risks.

questions.question: Organizations follow ISO/IEC 27001 because it provides:
questions.explanation: It is recognized internationally.

questions.question: The history of ISO/IEC 27001 demonstrates the importance of:
questions.explanation: Security standards evolve with the threat landscape.

questions.question: The ultimate significance of ISO/IEC 27001 history is:
options: The development of a globally trusted information security standard
questions.correct_answer: The development of a globally trusted information security standard
questions.explanation: Its evolution established a widely adopted security framework.
